quests.chemical_elements.hydrogen.desc:
Hydrogen is an essential component of countless &bMV&r+ chemical processes, such as acids or ammonia.

It can be obtained in &7LV&r in infinite amounts by electrolyzing water or by reacting water with methane.

Deuterium and Tritium are used in &dLuV&r for fusion and can be obtained by centrifuging hydrogen or electrolyzing heavy water.
quests.chemical_elements.helium.desc:
Helium is used in &6HV&r+ to cool down hot ingots in the vacuum freezer and to speed up the EBF.

It can be obtained in &6HV&r from liquid earth air distillation.

Helium 3 is used for recipes on the moon and can be obtained by a fluid drill on the moon or by centrifuging helium.
quests.chemical_elements.lithium.desc:
Lithium is the best electrolyte for &7LV&r and &6HV&r batteries.

It is abundant in Tungstate and Scheelite veins. The tungsten line yields lithium as a byproduct.
quests.chemical_elements.beryllium.desc:
Beryllium is used in &6HV&r to create Ender Dust. A beryllium fissile fuel rod is required to obtain Americium, Neptunium and Californium.

It can be obtained from emerald veins.
quests.chemical_elements.boron.desc:
Boron is a component of borosilicate glass used in &bMV&r+ to make gem lenses and in &6HV&r+ to make AE2 cables, Vitrified Ender Pearls and Fiber-Reinforced Circuit Boards.

It can be obtained in &bMV&r from Borax.
quests.chemical_elements.carbon.desc:
Carbon is the base of organic chemistry. It's used in &7LV&r+ to make resistors and in &6HV&r+ to make carbon fibers.

It can be obtained in &bMV&r in infinite amounts from oil and tar distillation.
quests.chemical_elements.nitrogen.desc:
Nitrogen is used in &7LV&r+ for countless chemical reactions and to speed up the EBF and pyrolyse oven.

It can be obtained in &7LV&r in infinite amounts  from air centrifuging.
quests.chemical_elements.oxygen.desc:
Oxygen is used in &7LV&r+ for countless chemical reactions and to speed up the EBF.

It can be obtained in &7LV&r in infinite amounts from air centrifuging and water electrolysis.
quests.chemical_elements.fluorine.desc:
Fluorine is used in &6HV&r+ for polytetrafluorethylene.

It can be obtained in &bMV&r from electrolyzing various ores such as topaz. Unlike other gaseous elements, fluorine cannot be obtained in infinite amounts, but topaz is fluorine-rich and abundant on the moon.
quests.chemical_elements.neon.desc:
Neon is used in &1IV&r+ to make nether stars.

It can be obtained in &5EV&r+ from mars air distillation.
quests.chemical_elements.sodium.desc:
Sodium is used in &7LV&r as a subpar battery electrolyte and in &bMV&r+ a small number of chemical reactions, especially when combined with chlorine to make salt.

It can be obtained in &7LV&r in infinite amounts from salt water electrolysis.
quests.chemical_elements.magnesium.desc:
Magnesium is used in &6HV&r to make &bMV&r superconductors and in &5EV&r to make magnalium for turbines.

It can be obtained in &7LV&r from electrolyzing various ores and in infinite amounts from obsidian.
quests.chemical_elements.aluminium.desc:
Aluminium is the base material of &bMV&r.

It can be obtained in &7LV&r as a byproduct of ore processing, in &bMV&r from electrolyzing various ores such as bauxite, in &6HV&r directly from aluminium ore found on the moon and in infinite amounts in &5EV&r from dusty bauxite.
quests.chemical_elements.silicon.desc:
Silicon is used to make in &7LV&r silicon rubber and silicon boules.

It can be obtained in &7LV&r in infinite amounts from centrifuging and electrolyzing flint dust. Silicon is a common byproduct of ore electrolysis.
quests.chemical_elements.phosphorus.desc:
Phosphorus is a plant nutrient. In &bMV&r+ it is used to make &7LV&r superconductors.

It can be obtained from apatite and in &5EV&r from Dusty Tricalcium Phosphate.
quests.chemical_elements.sulfur.desc:
Sulfur is used in &8ULV&r+ to make rubber and in &bMV&r+ to make sulfuric acid.

It can be obtained in infinite amounts from oil distillation. It is a very common element found in ores. Sulfur is a common byproduct of ore electrolysis
quests.chemical_elements.chlorine.desc:
Chlorine is used in &bMV&r+ to make hydrochloric acid.

It can be obtained in &7LV&r from salt water electrolysis.
quests.chemical_elements.argon.desc:
Argon is used in &5EV&r+ to speed up the EBF.

It can be obtained in &6HV&r from liquid air distillation.
quests.chemical_elements.potassium.desc:
Potassium is a plant nutrient. It is used in &6HV&r+ to make ender dust and in &5EV&r+ in trace amounts to make polybenzimidazole.

It can be obtained from Saltpeter.
quests.chemical_elements.calcium.desc:
Calcium is a plant nutrient. It is used in &6HV&r+ to make &6HV&r superconductors.

It can be obtained infinitely from bone meal and in &5EV&r from Dusty Tricalcium Phosphate.
quests.chemical_elements.titanium.desc:
Titanium is the base material of &5EV&r.

It can be obtained by processing Ilmenite.
quests.chemical_elements.vanadium.desc:
Vanadium is used in &bMV&r to make Vanadium Steel and in &1IV&r to make Advanced SMD Transistors.

It can be obtained in &bMV&r from Vanadium Magnetite
quests.chemical_elements.chromium.desc:
Chromium is used in &6HV&r+ to make Stainless Steel (the base material of &6HV&r) and other various alloys.

It can be obtained in &bMV&r from Chromite.
quests.chemical_elements.manganese.desc:
Manganese is in &6HV&r+ to make Stainless Steel (the base material of &6HV&r) and other various alloys and in &bMV&r to make &7LV&r superconductors.

It can be obtained from Pyrolusite.
quests.chemical_elements.iron.desc:
Iron is used in the &8Stone Age&r to make wrought iron and steel. Steel is the base material of &7LV&r.

It can be obtained in ludicrous amounts from limonite, hematite, pyrite, goethite and magnetite veins. In &6HV&r+ it can be obtained  in infinite amounts from Dusty Goethe Ore.
quests.chemical_elements.cobalt.desc:
Cobalt is used in the &8Stone Age&r to make Cobalt Brass and in &6HV&r+ to make various alloys. Small Cobalt Item Pipes transfer 1stack/s, making cobalt the best material for item pipes until &bMV&r.

It can be obtained from Cobaltite.
quests.chemical_elements.nickel.desc:
Nickel is used in the &8Stone Age&r to make black steel and in &7LV&r to make invar and cupronickel.

It can be obtained from Garnierite and Pentlandite.
quests.chemical_elements.copper.desc:
Copper is an essential material of the &8Stone Age&r. Annealed Copper is used in &7LV&r+ to make electronic components and circuit boards.

It can be obtained from Tetrahedrite, Malachite, Chalcocite, Bornite, Chalcopyrite and Native Copper.
quests.chemical_elements.zinc.desc:
Zinc is used in the &8Stone Age&r to make brass and bismuth bronze. It is later used in trace amounts to make inductors and Heat Pipe Casings.

It can be obtained from Sphalerite.
quests.chemical_elements.gallium.desc:
Gallium is used in &bMV&r+ to make silicon boules and diodes.

It can be obtained in &bMV&r from bauxite and sphalerite ore processing.
quests.chemical_elements.arsenic.desc:
Arsenic is used in &bMV&r+ to make silicon boules and diodes.

It can be obtained in &bMV&r from Cobaltite.
quests.chemical_elements.krypton.desc:
Krypton is used in &5EV&r+ to make Iodine from Warpane and Crimsene.

It can be obtained in &5EV&r from liquid mars air distillation.
quests.chemical_elements.yttrium.desc:
Yttrium is used in &5EV&r+ to make a &3UV&r wire alloy.

It is a rare earth element and can be obtained from processing Bastnasite veins.
quests.chemical_elements.zirconium.desc: Zirconium is a currently unused material that will have uses on Venus.
quests.chemical_elements.niobium.desc:
Niobium is used in &5EV&r to make Niobium Titanium which is used in &cZPM&r to make Wetware Printed Circuit Boards.

It can be in &bMV&r obtained from Pyrochlore.
quests.chemical_elements.molybdenum.desc:
Molybdenum is used to make many &6HV&r+ alloys such as Ultimet.

It can be obtained from Molybdenite veins found exclusively in the Overworld.
quests.chemical_elements.ruthenium.desc:
Ruthenium is used in &5EV&r to make RTM Coils and in &dLuV&r as a part of Ruridit to make &dLuV&r motors.

It is a platinum group element and can be obtained at &5EV&r.
quests.chemical_elements.rhodium.desc:
Rhodium is used to make Rhodium Plated Palladium, the base material of &dLuV&r.

It is a platinum group element and can be obtained at &5EV&r.
quests.chemical_elements.palladium.desc:
Palladium is used to make Rhodium Plated Palladium, the base material of &dLuV&r.

It is a platinum group element and can be obtained at &5EV&r.
quests.chemical_elements.silver.desc:
Silver is used in the &8Stone Age&r to make Sterling Silver, and in &6HV&r to make Electrum and Blue Alloy.

It can be obtained by mining and in &5EV&r infinite amounts from Dusty Silver Ore.
quests.chemical_elements.cadmium.desc:
Cadmium is a subpar &7LV&r and &bMV&r battery electrolyte.

It can be obtained as a byproduct of washing Tetrahedrite with Sodium Persulfate or from Rare Earth centrifuging.

Note: Cadmium is not actually a rare earth element.
quests.chemical_elements.indium.desc:
Indium is used in &1IV&r+ Advanced SMD Diodes and &dLuV&r superconductors

It can be made by mixing Purified Sphalerite and Purified Galena.
quests.chemical_elements.tin.desc:
Tin is used in the &8Stone Age&r to make Bronze, in &8ULV&r to make Tin Alloy, in &7LV&r to make Soldering Alloy and Potin.

It can be obtained from Cassiterite and Tin ores.
quests.chemical_elements.antimony.desc:
Antimony is used in &7LV&r to make Battery Alloy and Soldering Alloy.

It can be obtained from Stibnite.
quests.chemical_elements.iodine.desc:
Iodine is used in &5EV&r to make ostrum iodide and RTM coils.

It can be obtained in &5EV&r by processing warpane and crimsene.
quests.chemical_elements.xenon.desc:
Xenon is used in &4UHV&r to make Neutronium-doped Silicon Boules.

It can be obtained with liquid mars air distillation.
quests.chemical_elements.caesium.desc:
Caesium is a currently unused material that will have uses on Venus.

It can be obtained as a byproduct of Pollucite and Lepidolite.
quests.chemical_elements.barium.desc:
Barium is used in the &6HV&r and &dLuV&r superconductors and in &3UV&r wires.

It can be obtained from barite.
quests.chemical_elements.lanthanum.desc:
Lanthanum is used in &dLuV&r to make Lutetium.

It is a rare earth element and can be obtained from processing Bastnasite veins.
quests.chemical_elements.cerium.desc:
Cerium is used in &cZPM&r as an alternative source of Plutonium 241.

It is a rare earth element and can be obtained from processing Bastnasite veins.
quests.chemical_elements.neodymium.desc:
Neodymium is used in &5EV&r+ electric motors.

It is a rare earth element and can be obtained from processing Bastnasite veins.
quests.chemical_elements.samarium.desc:
Samarium is used in &cZPM&r+ electric motors.

It is a rare earth element and can be obtained from processing Bastnasite veins.
quests.chemical_elements.europium.desc:
Europium is used in &cZPM&r as a component of &cZPM&r motors and to initiate the Crystal Chip loop.

It is obtained in &dLuV&r by fusing Neodymium and Hydrogen.
quests.chemical_elements.lutetium.desc:
Lutetium is used in &3UV&r to make Neutronium.

It is obtained in &dLuV&r by fusing Lanthanum and Silicon.
quests.chemical_elements.tantalum.desc:
Tantalum is used in &6HV&r to make SMD components.

It can be obtained from Tantalite
quests.chemical_elements.tungsten.desc:
Tungsten is used to make the base material of &1IV&r.

It is obtained in &5EV&r by processing Tungstate and Scheelite.
quests.chemical_elements.rhenium.desc:
Rhenium is used in &6HV&r to make the cleanroom and in &5EV&r as a catalyst for BTX fuel.

It is obtained by mining in the desert.
quests.chemical_elements.osmium.desc:
Osmium is used in Osmiridium to make &cZPM&r Components.

It is a platinum group element and can be obtained at &5EV&r.
quests.chemical_elements.iridium.desc:
Iridium is used in Osmiridium to make &cZPM&r Components.

It is a platinum group element and can be obtained at &5EV&r.
quests.chemical_elements.platinum.desc:
Platinum is used to make the &5EV&r superconductor and in &dLuV&r to make crystal circuits.

It is a platinum group element and can be obtained at &5EV&r.
quests.chemical_elements.gold.desc:
Gold is used in the steam age to make rose gold, in &7LV&r to make a drum capable of containing acids, in &6HV&r to make electrum and in &5EV&r to make nano circuits.

It can be obtained from Native Gold.
quests.chemical_elements.mercury.desc:
Mercury is used in &7LV&r+ for ore washing and in the &6HV&r superconductor.

It can be obtained by centrifuging redstone and cinnabar.
quests.chemical_elements.thallium.desc:
Thallium is used in &5EV&r+ as an optional soldering alloy that becomes compulsory at &cZPM&r+.

It can be obtained in &5EV&r from dusty lorandite.
quests.chemical_elements.lead.desc:
Lead is used in &8ULV&r to make alternators and in &7LV&r+ to make soldering alloy.

It can be obtained from Lead Ore and in &5EV&r in infinite amounts from Dusty Raw Lead.
quests.chemical_elements.bismuth.desc:
Bismuth is used in the &8Stone Age&r to make bismuth bronze and in &cZPM&r to make a soldering alloy.

It can be obtained by mining Bismuth Ore.
quests.chemical_elements.radon.desc:
Radon is used in &5EV&r+ to make the Quantum Eye, Qubit CPU wafer, Quantum Star, the &5EV&r superconductor and ostrum dusty ores.

It can be obtained in &5EV&r with uranium fission.
quests.chemical_elements.thorium.desc:
Thorium is used in &5EV&r+ in fission.

It is obtained by processing thorianite. It can be obtained in infinite amounts from Dusty Raw Thorianite.
quests.chemical_elements.uranium.desc:
Uranium is used in &5EV&r+ in fission.

It is obtained from uraninite.
quests.chemical_elements.neptunium.desc:
Neptunium is used in &5EV&r+ in fission.

It can be obtained as a tiny dust from the Thorium-Uranium Breeder Rod.
quests.chemical_elements.plutonium.desc:
Plutonium 239 is used in &5EV&r+ in fission.

It is obtained from uranium fission.

Plutonium 241 is used in &cZPM&r to create Americium 243 and can be obtained by centrifuging plutonium 239.
quests.chemical_elements.americium.desc:
Americium 241 is used in &5EV&r+ in fission.

It can be obtained as a tiny dust from the Thorium-Uranium Breeder Rod.

Americium 243 is used in &3UV&r to make Neutronium and is made by fusing Lutetium and Chromium or Plutonium 241 and Hydrogen.
quests.chemical_elements.californium.des:
Californium is a currently unused element that will later be used for fission.

It can be obtained as a tiny dust from the Thorium-Uranium Breeder Rod.
quests.chemical_elements.darmstadtium.de:
Darmstadtium is the base material of &3UV&r. 

It is obtained in &dLuV&r by fusing Arsenic and Ruthenium.
quests.chemical_elements.naquadah.desc:
Naquadah is an important &dLuV&r material that can be refined into more Stargate metals.

It is obtained from the Beneath.

Naquadah is a fictional element from the Sci-Fi franchise Stargate.
quests.chemical_elements.trinium.desc:
Trinium is used in &dLuV&r to make &cZPM&r components and in &cZPM&r to make Trinium coils.

It is obtained by refining naquadah.
quests.chemical_elements.duranium.desc:
Duranium is used in &dLuV&r to make Tritanium.

It is obtained by fusing Gallium and Radon.
quests.chemical_elements.tritanium.desc:
Tritanium is used in &3UV&r to make &3UV&r components and Tritanium coils.

It is obtained in &dLuV&r by fusing Titanium and Duranium.
quests.chemical_elements.neutronium.desc:
Neutronium is the base material of &4UHV&r and is used to make the most powerful tools.

It is obtained in &3UV&r by fusing Americium and Naquadria.
